## Summary
Brief description of what this PR changes on the support site.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Content update (FAQ, copy, links)
- [ ] Structural / layout change
- [ ] New page or section
- [ ] Styling / CSS
- [ ] Bug fix

## Testing Done
- [ ] Previewed locally or on GitHub Pages
- [ ] Links checked (no 404s)
- [ ] Renders correctly on mobile and desktop
- [ ] No broken images or assets
- [ ] No secrets / private info accidentally included

## Screenshots
If visual changes, include before/after screenshots.

Anything specific to watch for.
